opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia Covers waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I spent $47 to fix my pet-destroyed couch — looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Worn, scratched, pet-hair-covered sectional with visible stains and claw marks
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, taut-fitting cover that looks like a brand new couch, zero pet hair visible
opportunities.why_now: Pet ownership is at an all-time high and spring shedding season drives a surge in searches for pet-hair furniture solutions every May.

opportunities.specific_product: Expandable under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawers
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $34 organizer turned my chaos cabinet into a spa bathroom
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered under-sink cabinet overflowing with loose bottles, bags, and cleaning supplies piled on top of each other
opportunities.after_state: Tiered pull-out organizer with every product visible, labeled, and accessible in seconds
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning momentum in May keeps bathroom organization searches elevated as people tackle remaining clutter after decluttering larger rooms.

opportunities.specific_product: Modular closet shelf and hanging rod organizer kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: I spent $89 and finally got my dream closet — no contractor needed
opportunities.before_state: Single rod crammed with clothes, shoes piled on the floor, shelves overflowing with no system
opportunities.after_state: Double-hang section, dedicated shelf zones for folded items, shoe cubbies — every inch used
opportunities.why_now: Post-spring-cleaning energy in May converts browsers into buyers as people have already decluttered and now want permanent organization infrastructure.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia bamboo expandable drawer divider set
opportunities.transformation_hook: A $28 drawer set stopped the daily 'where is everything' chaos
opportunities.before_state: Junk drawer and utensil drawer mixed with loose items, rubber bands, mystery gadgets, and tangled tools
opportunities.after_state: Clean bamboo-divided sections with each utensil category separated and instantly grab-able
opportunities.why_now: Kitchen organization content consistently outperforms other home categories in saves and shares on Reels, and Syruvia's 20% commission makes the CPM math very attractive.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow with adjustable fill
opportunities.transformation_hook: I woke up without neck pain for the first time in 2 years — $79 pillow did it
opportunities.before_state: Flat, unsupportive pillow causing morning neck stiffness, shoulder ache, and restless sleep
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic curved pillow that keeps the spine aligned all night, waking up refreshed and pain-free
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness is a top-5 health concern in 2026 and Eli & Elm's 20% commission on a $79 AOV makes this one of the highest-EPC opportunities in the bedroom category.
